---
title: "Family Support"
description: "Human-centred support for families navigating complex rehabilitation and care needs."
---

# Family Support

Families often carry much of the practical and emotional weight following serious injury or complex health changes.

::: {.highlight-box}
We help families understand the process, coordinate support, and focus on practical next steps.
:::

## Support May Include

- Explaining rehabilitation planning
- Coordinating professionals
- Supporting communication
- Helping prepare for discharge or transition home
- Identifying community support
- Reviewing changing needs over time

[Contact Us](contact.qmd){.button-link}
